description: Add configurable cadence-based reflection checkpoints to the ralphi loop, including checkpoint prompt injection, structured reflection completion metadata, and visibility in loop status.

userStories.title: Add reflection checkpoint config model
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want reflection cadence options in project config so that reflection behavior is configurable without code changes.
acceptanceCriteria: loop config supports optional reflectEvery (integer) and reflectInstructions (string).
reflectEvery <= 0 is treated as disabled.
Config parsing tolerates missing or malformed reflection values without crashing.
Existing loop settings (guidance, reviewPasses, trajectoryGuard) continue to work unchanged.
Tests cover default-disabled and configured reflection behavior.
lint, typecheck, and unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Inject reflection-mode prompt on checkpoint iterations
userStories.description: As a user, I want scheduled reflection prompts during loop execution so the agent periodically reassesses trajectory instead of grinding blindly.
acceptanceCriteria: Runtime determines checkpoint iterations using loop.reflectEvery cadence.
Checkpoint iterations include a dedicated reflection prompt block with explicit questions and required outputs.
If loop.reflectInstructions is set, it is used; otherwise a default reflection template is used.
Non-checkpoint iterations keep current prompt behavior.
Loop status includes next reflection countdown when cadence is enabled.
Tests verify checkpoint vs non-checkpoint prompt and status behavior.
lint, typecheck, and unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Require structured reflection metadata at checkpoints
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want checkpoint iterations to require structured reflection output so reflection is auditable and not just narrative text.
acceptanceCriteria: ralphi_phase_done supports additive optional reflectionSummary and nextIterationPlan metadata fields.
When an iteration is a reflection checkpoint, completion fails with actionable guidance if required reflection fields are missing.
Validation is scoped to loop iterations only and does not affect init/prd/convert phases.
Non-checkpoint iterations do not require reflection metadata.
Tests cover checkpoint pass/fail validation and non-loop safety.
lint, typecheck, and unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Document reflection cadence and migration guidance
userStories.description: As a user, I want clear docs for reflection cadence setup so I can safely enable it project-by-project.
acceptanceCriteria: README loop/config docs include loop.reflectEvery and loop.reflectInstructions usage.
CHANGELOG includes release and migration notes for reflection checkpoints.
Docs clearly state default-off behavior and gradual rollout guidance.
lint, typecheck, and unit tests pass.
